title: 30Pcs Mini Champagne Gold Bow, Self Adhesive Gold Bows with Sticky Gel Pads, Satin Bow for Gift Wrapping, Ribbon Bow for Craft DIY Sewing Wedding Birthday Party Crafts Gift Bakery Candy Bags
features: Elegant Champagne Gold Finish: These mini bows feature a soft satin texture in a stylish champagne gold tone, offering a subtle shimmer that adds refined charm to gift wrapping, DIY crafts, or decorative displays.

Convenient Self-Adhesive Design: Each ribbon bow comes pre-attached with a discreet sticky gel pad, allowing for quick and easy placement on gift boxes, candy bags, bakery packaging or craft projects with no glue required.

Mini Size, Versatile Use: Measuring approximately 8 x 8 cm, these mini bows are ideal for smaller surfaces such as treat bags, wedding favours, handmade cards, candles, or party décor, where a delicate accent is desired.

Soft Satin Ribbon Material: Made from double-sided satin ribbon with a smooth texture and gentle sheen, these gold bows enhance the visual appeal of your packaging or creative work while remaining lightweight and flexible.

Perfect for Creative Projects: Suitable for seasonal packaging, birthday parties, craft sewing, or wedding invitations, these mini gold bows are a charming embellishment for pink-themed crafts, gold ribbon décor or handmade gifts.
description: Product Description Mini Champagne Gold Bow Self Adhesive Gold Bows with Sticky Gel Pads Satin Bow for Gift Wrapping Premium Champagne Gold Finish: These gold bows feature an elegant champagne gold satin finish that adds a touch of understated luxury to your creations. The consistent metallic sheen and quality ribbon material offer a sophisticated appearance suitable for both casual and formal decorative applications.
